# Stackmate — AI-Powered Business Systems, Perth WA

> Perth's fastest AI systems integrator. Custom automation, AI agents, and business infrastructure delivered in 1-2 days.

## About
Stackmate builds the systems that run your business. We deliver AI agents, custom software, business automation, websites, system integrations, branding, data analytics, and AI consulting. Based in Perth, Western Australia. We serve mining companies, local businesses, agencies, and enterprises.

## Services
- AI Agents & Chatbots — 24/7 customer support, lead qualification, internal ops
- Business Automation — invoicing, scheduling, reporting, workflows
- Custom Software — dashboards, portals, internal tools
- Websites & Web Apps — fast, conversion-optimized
- System Integrations — CRM, ERP, accounting connected
- Branding & Design — logos, identity, design systems
- Data & Analytics — dashboards, reporting, AI insights
- AI Consulting — operations audit, automation roadmap

## Key Facts
- Location: Perth, Western Australia
- Delivery: 1-2 days (not weeks or months)
- Support: 24/7 + AI-powered
- Industries: Mining & Resources, Local Businesses, Agencies & Enterprises
